EXPLANATION: The paper exists with the exact title on the Journal of Writing Research website (jowr.org) and on ResearchGate, authored by Bouwer, Lesterhuis, De Smedt, Van Keer, and De Maeyer — matching the cited authors precisely. It appears in Vol. 15 No. 3 (2024), consistent with the cited year.
